Our Story

Forged in Discipline,
Built for the World

KAIPOR International Federation is a globally recognized martial arts body committed to preserving the ancient wisdom of traditional combat while advancing modern training methodologies. Built on the foundations of honor, resilience, and mastery.

"The true warrior does not seek the fight — he becomes the embodiment of control, precision, and indomitable spirit."

— Master Ajay Bharath

Under the direct guidance of our Chief Master, KAIPOR has cultivated practitioners across disciplines — from Tang Soo Do and Taekwondo to full-contact combat and classical weapon arts.

Tang Soo Do Taekwondo Weapon Arts MMA Self Defense Kids Programs
Training Programs

Eight Paths to Mastery

Every discipline, every technique — structured for your journey from foundation to federation level.

01 🥋 Traditional Training ▾

The cornerstone of all martial arts practice. Traditional training builds the authentic foundation — classical stances, core technique discipline, balance training, breathing control, and the ancient movement patterns that have been refined over centuries. This is where the warrior's journey truly begins.

Base Movements Stance Mastery Balance Core Techniques Breathing Control
02 ⚔️ Weapon Training ▾

Ancient weapon systems brought to life through rigorous practice. Students learn the staff, sword, and classical weapon forms of the Asian martial arts lineage. Weapon training sharpens focus, coordination, and spatial awareness to a level that empty-hand training alone cannot achieve.

Staff Forms Blade Arts Classical Kata Coordination
03 🥊 Fight Training ▾

Full-contact combat preparation under professional guidance. Fight training covers ring strategy, opponent reading, pressure management, and controlled sparring. Students are conditioned to perform with composure under the full intensity of competition environments.

Sparring Ring Strategy Pressure Training Competition Prep
04 👊 Strike Training ▾

Dedicated striking mechanics training — punches, kicks, elbow strikes, and knee techniques developed to maximum power and precision. Strike training isolates the biomechanics of impact, ensuring that every technique generates authentic force from correct body alignment.

Punch Mechanics Kick Power Elbow & Knee Speed Drills
05 🏆 MMA Training ▾

Mixed Martial Arts integration — combining striking, clinch work, takedowns, and ground control into a unified combat system. MMA training at KAIPOR is grounded in traditional principles while building complete modern combat competence for practitioners serious about full-spectrum martial arts.

Striking Clinch Work Takedowns Ground Control Full-Contact
06 🛡️ Self Defense Training ▾

Practical personal protection systems designed for real-world application. Self Defense training covers threat assessment, escape techniques, controlled responses, and situational awareness — knowledge that extends beyond the dojo and into everyday life for individuals, families, and professionals.

Real-World Scenarios Escape Techniques Threat Awareness All Ages
07 🌟 Kids Training ▾

Martial arts development crafted specifically for young practitioners. Kids training builds physical coordination, focus, respect, and self-confidence through age-appropriate techniques and progressive belt progression. Children learn not just how to move — but how to carry themselves with dignity and discipline.

Age-Appropriate Belt Progression Confidence Discipline Fun & Safe
08 💪 Strength & Conditioning for Martial Arts ▾

Purpose-built athletic conditioning aligned with martial arts demands. This program develops the explosive power, functional strength, flexibility, and cardiovascular endurance that separate good martial artists from elite ones. Every training element is calibrated to enhance on-mat performance.

Explosive Power Functional Strength Flexibility Cardio Endurance
The Master

Aqvee Bharath

KAIPOR International Federation · Chief Master
Ajay Bharath
Grandmaster · Tang Soo Do · Taekwondo · Combat Arts

Master Ajay Bharath is the founding grandmaster and chief instructor of KAIPOR International Federation. With deep roots in Tang Soo Do and Taekwondo, he has dedicated his life to the authentic transmission of martial arts — from classical forms and weapon traditions to modern full-contact combat and self-defense systems.

His training philosophy bridges the ancient and the modern: honoring the spiritual depth of traditional martial arts while building real-world combat competence in every practitioner who walks through the federation's doors.

Tang Soo Do
Korean traditional art — open-hand strikes, classical forms
Taekwondo
Dynamic kicking art — high kicks, spinning techniques
Weapon Arts
Staff, blade, and classical weapon traditions
Combat Training
Full-contact fight preparation and self-defense
Current Form
Open Hand Strike
Master Aqvee demonstrates the classical open-palm strike — power flowing from stance to fingertip.
Learn from the Best

The Art in Motion

Tang Soo Do · Power
The Drive Punch
Forward drive punch with full-body commitment — the entire body becomes one weapon.
Weapon Arts · Classical
Staff Mastery
Ancient weapon traditions practiced in the open — the staff as an extension of the warrior's will.
